index.html(https://github.com/user-attachments/files/28672654/essenza_natura.html)
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="es">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Essenza Natura — Jabones Artesanales Premium</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cormorant+Garamond:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,500;0,600;1,300;1,400&family=Montserrat:wght@300;400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style> :root { --gold: #D4AD43; --ebony: #3F3400; --cacao: #6A4933; --cinnamon: #956431; --vanilla: #E8E1A2; --cream: #FAF6ED; --dark: #1A1200; } * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; } html { scroll-behavior: smooth; } body { font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; background: var(--cream); color: var(--ebony); overflow-x: hidden; } /* NAVBAR */ nav { position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 100; padding: 16px 5%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; background: rgba(250,246,237,0.92); backdrop-filter: blur(10px); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(212,173,67,0.2); } .nav-logo img { height: 52px; } .nav-links { display: flex; gap: 32px; list-style: none; } .nav-links a { font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--cacao); text-decoration: none; font-weight: 400; transition: color .3s; } .nav-links a:hover { color: var(--gold); } .nav-cta { background: var(--gold); color: var(--dark); padding: 10px 22px; border-radius: 2px; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 600; text-decoration: none; transition: background .3s, transform .2s; } .nav-cta:hover { background: var(--cinnamon); color: #fff; transform: translateY(-1px); } /* HERO */ #hero { min-height: 100vh; display: flex; align-items: center; padding: 120px 5% 80px; background: radial-gradient(ellipse 70% 80% at 70% 50%, rgba(212,173,67,0.08) 0%, transparent 60%), linear-gradient(160deg, var(--cream) 0%, #f5edd8 100%); position: relative; overflow: hidden; } #hero::before { content: ''; position: absolute; right: -5%; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); width: 48vw; height: 110vh; background: radial-gradient(ellipse at center, rgba(212,173,67,0.12), transparent 70%); pointer-events: none; } .hero-inner { max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; width: 100%; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 80px; align-items: center; } .hero-text { position: relative; z-index: 2; animation: fadeUp .9s ease both; } .hero-badge { display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 3px; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--gold); border: 1px solid var(--gold); padding: 6px 16px; margin-bottom: 28px; border-radius: 2px; } .hero-title { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-size: clamp(2.4rem, 4.5vw, 4rem); font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.15; color: var(--ebony); margin-bottom: 24px; } .hero-title em { font-style: italic; color: var(--cinnamon); } .hero-subtitle { font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.9; font-weight: 300; letter-spacing: .3px; color: var(--cacao); max-width: 460px; margin-bottom: 44px; } .hero-btns { display: flex; gap: 16px; flex-wrap: wrap; } .btn-primary { background: var(--ebony); color: var(--vanilla); padding: 14px 34px; border-radius: 2px; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 600; text-decoration: none; cursor: pointer; border: none; transition: background .3s, transform .2s, box-shadow .3s; box-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(63,52,0,0.2); } .btn-primary:hover { background: var(--cacao); transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(63,52,0,0.3); } .btn-secondary { background: transparent; color: var(--ebony); padding: 14px 34px; border-radius: 2px; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 600; text-decoration: none; cursor: pointer; border: 1.5px solid var(--cacao); transition: all .3s; } .btn-secondary:hover { background: var(--vanilla); border-color: var(--gold); } .hero-visual { display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; animation: fadeIn 1.2s ease .3s both; } .hero-circle { width: clamp(260px, 35vw, 440px); height: clamp(260px, 35vw, 440px); border-radius: 50%; background: radial-gradient(ellipse at 35% 35%, rgba(232,225,162,0.6), rgba(212,173,67,0.12) 50%, transparent 75%); border: 1px solid rgba(212,173,67,0.3); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; position: relative; } .hero-circle::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: -12px; border-radius: 50%; border: 1px solid rgba(212,173,67,0.12); } .hero-circle::after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: -28px; border-radius: 50%; border: 1px dashed rgba(212,173,67,0.1); } .hero-circle img { width: 60%; opacity: 0.85; } /* SECTION COMMON */ section { padding: 100px 5%; } .section-label { font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 4px; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--gold); margin-bottom: 16px; display: block; } .section-title { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-size: clamp(2rem, 3.5vw, 3.2rem); font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.2; color: var(--ebony); margin-bottom: 20px; } .section-desc { font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.9; font-weight: 300; color: var(--cacao); max-width: 540px; } .center { text-align: center; } .center .section-desc { margin: 0 auto; } /* PROBLEM */ #problema { background: var(--ebony); } #problema .section-label { color: rgba(232,225,162,0.6); } #problema .section-title { color: var(--vanilla); } #problema .section-desc { color: rgba(232,225,162,0.6); } .problem-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(260px, 1fr)); gap: 2px; margin-top: 60px; } .problem-card { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); padding: 48px 40px; border-left: 3px solid var(--gold); position: relative; overflow: hidden; transition: background .3s; } .problem-card:hover { background: rgba(212,173,67,0.06); } .problem-card::before { content: attr(data-n); position: absolute; top: 20px; right: 28px; font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-size: 72px; font-weight: 300; color: rgba(212,173,67,0.08); line-height: 1; } .problem-icon { font-size: 32px; margin-bottom: 20px; display: block; } .problem-card p { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-size: 1.45rem; font-weight: 300; line-height: 1.5; color: rgba(232,225,162,0.9); } /* PRODUCTS */ #productos { background: #faf6ed; } .products-intro { max-width: 600px; margin: 0 auto 64px; } .products-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr)); gap: 28px; max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; } .product-card { background: #fff; border-radius: 4px; padding: 0 0 40px; overflow:hidden; border: 1px solid rgba(212,173,67,0.18); box-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(106,73,51,0.06); transition: transform .3s, box-shadow .3s, border-color .3s; position: relative; overflow: hidden; } .product-card::after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; top: auto; height: 3px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--gold), var(--cinnamon)); transform: scaleX(0); transform-origin: left; transition: transform .4s; } .product-card:hover { transform: translateY(-6px); box-shadow: 0 16px 48px rgba(106,73,51,0.14); border-color: rgba(212,173,67,0.4); } .product-card:hover::after { transform: scaleX(1); } .product-icon { font-size: 36px; margin-bottom: 20px; } .product-tag { font-size: 9px; letter-spacing: 3px; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--gold); font-weight: 500; margin-bottom: 6px; display: block; } .product-name { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-size: 1.8rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--ebony); margin-bottom: 4px; } .product-formula { font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--cinnamon); margin-bottom: 16px; display: block; } .product-desc { font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.8; color: var(--cacao); font-weight: 300; margin-bottom: 28px; } .product-price { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-size: 2rem; color: var(--ebony); font-weight: 500; } .product-price span { font-size: 14px; color: var(--cacao); font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; font-weight: 300; } .kit-badge { display: inline-block; background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--gold), var(--cinnamon)); color: #fff; font-size: 9px; letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 2px; margin-bottom: 20px; font-weight: 600; } /* RESULTADOS */ #resultados { background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--ebony) 0%, #2a2100 100%); position: relative; overflow: hidden; } #resultados::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; background: radial-gradient(ellipse at 20% 50%, rgba(212,173,67,0.06), transparent 60%), radial-gradient(ellipse at 80% 50%, rgba(149,100,49,0.06), transparent 60%); } .stats-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px, 1fr)); gap: 2px; margin-top: 60px; } .stat-item { padding: 44px 36px; text-align: center; position: relative; } .stat-item::before { content: ''; position: absolute; top: 0; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); width: 40px; height: 2px; background: var(--gold); } .stat-number { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-size: clamp(2.8rem, 5vw, 4.4rem); font-weight: 300; color: var(--gold); line-height: 1; margin-bottom: 12px; } .stat-title { font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--vanilla); margin-bottom: 12px; font-weight: 500; } .stat-desc { font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.7; color: rgba(232,225,162,0.5); font-weight: 300; } /* PROCESO */ #proceso { background: var(--cream); } .process-track { position: relative; margin-top: 64px; max-width: 960px; margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; } .process-line { position: absolute; top: 28px; left: 5%; right: 5%; height: 1px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--gold) 20%, var(--gold) 80%, transparent); } .process-steps { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); gap: 24px; position: relative; z-index: 2; } .process-step { text-align: center; padding: 0 8px; } .step-dot { width: 110px; height: 110px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--cream); border: 2px solid var(--gold); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 22px; margin: 0 auto 20px; transition: background .3s, transform .3s; overflow: hidden; } .process-step:hover .step-dot { background: var(--gold); transform: scale(1.1); } .step-num { font-size: 9px; letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--gold); margin-bottom: 8px; display: block; } .step-title { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-size: 1.1rem; color: var(--ebony); margin-bottom: 10px; font-weight: 500; } .step-desc { font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.7; color: var(--cacao); font-weight: 300; } /* ABOUT */ #sobre { background: linear-gradient(150deg, #f5edd8 0%, var(--cream) 100%); } .about-inner { max-width: 1100px; margin: 0 auto; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1.2fr; gap: 80px; align-items: center; } .about-portrait { aspect-ratio: 3/4; max-height: 460px; border-radius: 4px; overflow: hidden; position: relative; } .portrait-placeholder { width: 100%; height: 100%; background: linear-gradient(145deg, rgba(212,173,67,0.15), rgba(149,100,49,0.12)); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border: 1px solid rgba(212,173,67,0.3); border-radius: 4px; font-size: 80px; flex-direction: column; gap: 16px; } .portrait-placeholder p { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-size: 1.1rem; color: var(--cinnamon); font-weight: 300; } .about-text .section-label { margin-bottom: 10px; } .about-name { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-size: clamp(1.8rem, 3vw, 2.6rem); font-weight: 400; color: var(--ebony); margin-bottom: 8px; } .about-role { font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 3px; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--cinnamon); margin-bottom: 28px; display: block; } .about-bio { font-size: 15px; line-height: 2; font-weight: 300; color: var(--cacao); margin-bottom: 36px; } .about-values { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 16px; } .about-value { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 16px; padding: 16px 20px; background: rgba(212,173,67,0.06); border-radius: 2px; border-left: 2px solid var(--gold); } .about-value span:first-child { font-size: 20px; flex-shrink: 0; } .about-value p { font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.7; color: var(--cacao); font-weight: 300; } /* TESTIMONIOS */ #testimonios { background: var(--cream); } .testimonios-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(340px, 1fr)); gap: 32px; margin-top: 60px; max-width: 900px; margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; } .testimonio { background: #fff; padding: 44px 40px; border-radius: 4px; border: 1px solid rgba(212,173,67,0.2); box-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(106,73,51,0.06); position: relative; transition: box-shadow .3s; } .testimonio:hover { box-shadow: 0 12px 40px rgba(106,73,51,0.12); } .quote-mark { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-size: 6rem; color: var(--gold); opacity: .25; line-height: .6; margin-bottom: 16px; display: block; } .testimonio-text { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-size: 1.35rem; font-style: italic; font-weight: 300; line-height: 1.7; color: var(--ebony); margin-bottom: 28px; } .testimonio-author { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px; } .author-avatar { width: 44px; height: 44px; border-radius: 50%; background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--gold), var(--cinnamon)); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 18px; flex-shrink: 0; } .author-name { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 1px; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--ebony); margin-bottom: 2px; } .author-loc { font-size: 11px; color: var(--cacao); font-weight: 300; } .stars { color: var(--gold); font-size: 12px; margin-bottom: 6px; } /* CTA FINAL */ #cta { background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--cacao) 0%, var(--ebony) 100%); text-align: center; position: relative; overflow: hidden; } #cta::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; background: radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 0%, rgba(212,173,67,0.1), transparent 60%); } .cta-inner { position: relative; z-index: 2; max-width: 700px; margin: 0 auto; } .cta-inner .section-label { color: rgba(232,225,162,0.6); } .cta-title { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-size: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 3.6rem); font-weight: 300; font-style: italic; color: var(--vanilla); line-height: 1.25; margin-bottom: 24px; } .cta-desc { font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.9; color: rgba(232,225,162,0.65); font-weight: 300; margin-bottom: 48px; } .btn-cta { display: inline-block; background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--gold), var(--cinnamon)); color: var(--dark); padding: 18px 48px; border-radius: 2px; font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 2.5px; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 700; text-decoration: none; box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(212,173,67,0.3); transition: transform .3s, box-shadow .3s; } .btn-cta:hover { transform: translateY(-3px); box-shadow: 0 16px 48px rgba(212,173,67,0.4); } /* FOOTER */ footer { background: var(--dark); padding: 60px 5% 40px; border-top: 1px solid rgba(212,173,67,0.15); } .footer-inner { max-width: 1100px; margin: 0 auto; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1.5fr 1fr 1fr; gap: 60px; padding-bottom: 48px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06); margin-bottom: 32px; } .footer-brand img { height: 44px; margin-bottom: 16px; filter: brightness(1.1); } .footer-tagline { font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.8; color: rgba(232,225,162,0.45); font-weight: 300; } .footer-col-title { font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 3px; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--gold); margin-bottom: 20px; font-weight: 500; } .footer-col ul { list-style: none; } .footer-col ul li { margin-bottom: 10px; } .footer-col ul li a { font-size: 12px; color: rgba(232,225,162,0.5); text-decoration: none; font-weight: 300; transition: color .3s; } .footer-col ul li a:hover { color: var(--gold); } .social-links { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; } .social-link { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; color: rgba(232,225,162,0.6); text-decoration: none; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 300; transition: color .3s; } .social-link:hover { color: var(--gold); } .social-icon { width: 34px; height: 34px; border-radius: 50%; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); border: 1px solid rgba(212,173,67,0.2); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 14px; flex-shrink: 0; transition: background .3s, border-color .3s; } .social-link:hover .social-icon { background: rgba(212,173,67,0.15); border-color: var(--gold); } .footer-bottom { max-width: 1100px; margin: 0 auto; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; } .footer-copy { font-size: 11px; color: rgba(232,225,162,0.25); font-weight: 300; } .footer-city { font-size: 11px; color: rgba(232,225,162,0.25); letter-spacing: 1px; } /* WHATSAPP FLOAT */ .wa-float { position: fixed; bottom: 28px; right: 28px; z-index: 999; width: 58px; height: 58px; border-radius: 50%; background: #25D366; color: #fff; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; box-shadow: 0 6px 28px rgba(37,211,102,0.45); text-decoration: none; font-size: 26px; transition: transform .3s, box-shadow .3s; } .wa-float:hover { transform: scale(1.1) translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 12px 40px rgba(37,211,102,0.55); } .wa-pulse { position: absolute; inset: -4px; border-radius: 50%; background: rgba(37,211,102,0.3); animation: pulse 2s infinite; } @keyframes pulse { 0%,100%{opacity:1;transform:scale(1)} 50%{opacity:0;transform:scale(1.4)} } /* DIVIDER */ .divider { height: 1px; max-width: 80px; margin: 0 auto; background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, var(--gold), transparent); margin-bottom: 56px; } /* ANIMATIONS */ @keyframes fadeUp { from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(30px)} to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)} } @keyframes fadeIn { from{opacity:0} to{opacity:1} } .fade-in { animation: fadeUp .8s ease both; } /* RESPONSIVE */ @media (max-width: 768px) { nav { padding: 12px 5%; } .nav-links { display: none; } .hero-inner { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 40px; } .hero-visual { order: -1; } .hero-circle { width: 220px; height: 220px; } .about-inner { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } .about-portrait { max-height: 280px; } .process-steps { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); } .process-line { display: none; } .footer-inner { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 36px; } .footer-bottom { flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; text-align: center; } section { padding: 72px 5%; } }
</style>
</head>
<body> <!-- NAV -->
<nav> <div class="nav-logo"> <a href="#hero" style="display:flex;justify-content:center;"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Essenza Natura" style="border-radius:50%;object-fit:cover;width:52px;height:52px;"></a> </div> <ul class="nav-links"> <li><a href="#productos">Productos</a></li> <li><a href="#resultados">Resultados</a></li> <li><a href="#sobre">Sobre Mí</a></li> <li><a href="#testimonios">Testimonios</a></li> </ul> <a href="https://wa.me/584122558967" target="_blank" class="nav-cta">Contáctame</a>
</nav> <!-- HERO -->
<section id="hero"> <div class="hero-inner"> <div class="hero-text"> <span class="hero-badge">producto artesanal de las manos a tu piel</span> <h1 class="hero-title">Convierte tu rutina diaria en un <em>lujo natural.</em></h1> <p class="hero-subtitle">Fórmulas artesanales que combinan naturaleza, aroma y cuidado premium en cada barra, ideal para despertar tus sentidos transformando cada momento en un lujo único para tus sentidos.</p> <div class="hero-btns"> <a href="#productos" class="btn-primary">Comprar Ahora</a> <a href="#productos" class="btn-secondary">Explorar Colección</a> </div> </div> <div class="hero-visual"> <div class="hero-circle"> <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Essenza Natura Logo" style="width:90%;height:90%;object-fit:cover;border-radius:50%;display:block;margin:0 auto;"> </div> </div> </div>
</section> <!-- PROBLEMA -->
<section id="problema"> <div class="center"> <span class="section-label"> Reconocemos tu necesidad</span> <h2 class="section-title" style="color:var(--vanilla)">¿Te identificas<br>con alguno de estos?</h2> </div> <div class="problem-grid"> <div class="problem-card" data-n="01"> <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="" style="width:56px;height:56px;border-radius:50%;object-fit:cover;border:2px solid var(--gold);display:block;margin-bottom:20px;"><p>Te gustaría integrar en tu rutina ingredientes 100% naturales, premium en tu piel</p> </div> <div class="problem-card" data-n="02"> <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="" style="width:56px;height:56px;border-radius:50%;object-fit:cover;border:2px solid var(--gold);display:block;margin-bottom:20px;"><p>Quieres convertir tu día a día en tu momento de bienestar y lujo</p> </div> <div class="problem-card" data-n="03"> <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="" style="width:56px;height:56px;border-radius:50%;object-fit:cover;border:2px solid var(--gold);display:block;margin-bottom:20px;"><p>Cansado de productos genéricos sin exclusividad</p> </div> </div>
</section> <!-- PRODUCTOS -->
<section id="productos"> <div class="center products-intro"> <span class="section-label"> Nuestra Colección</span> <h2 class="section-title">Fórmulas creadas<br>para transformarte</h2> <div class="divider"></div> <p class="section-desc">Essenza Natura en cada producto presenta una obra hecha a mano diseñada con ingredientes de origen natural. Elige la fórmula que resuene con tu piel y tu necesidad.</p> </div> <div class="products-grid"> <!-- KIT --> <div class="product-card" style="grid-column: span 1; border-top: 3px solid var(--gold);"> <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Kit Premium" style="width:100%;height:180px;object-fit:cover;display:block;margin-bottom:0;"><div style="padding:24px 36px 0;"><span class="kit-badge">Kit Exclusivo</span> <span class="product-tag">Experiencia Completa</span> <div class="product-name">Kit Premium</div> <span class="product-formula">Aceite + Barra + Fórmula a tu elección</span> <p class="product-desc">La experiencia completa Essenza Natura. Incluye aceite y barra artesanal con la fórmula que más se adapte a tu piel. Un lujo diseñado especialmente para ti.</p> <div class="product-price">$22 <span>USD</span></div></div> </div> <!-- F1 --> <div class="product-card"> <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Detox" style="width:100%;height:180px;object-fit:cover;display:block;margin-bottom:0;"><div style="padding:24px 36px 0;"><span class="product-tag">Fórmula 01</span> <div class="product-name">Detox</div> <span class="product-formula">Purificación Profunda</span> <p class="product-desc">Desintoxica, blanquea, equilibra y purifica la piel. Ideal para pieles que necesitan renovación y limpieza intensiva.</p><div class="product-price" style="margin-top:16px;padding:0 36px;">$9 <span>USD</span></div></div> </div> <!-- F2 --> <div class="product-card"> <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Calm" style="width:100%;height:180px;object-fit:cover;display:block;margin-bottom:0;"><div style="padding:24px 36px 0;"><span class="product-tag">Fórmula 02</span> <div class="product-name">Calm</div> <span class="product-formula">Armonía & Bienestar</span> <p class="product-desc">Relaja y armoniza tu momento de skincare. Una vivencia sensorial que calma cuerpo y mente con cada uso.</p><div class="product-price" style="margin-top:16px;padding:0 36px;">$9 <span>USD</span></div></div> </div> <!-- F3 --> <div class="product-card"> <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Glow" style="width:100%;height:180px;object-fit:cover;display:block;margin-bottom:0;"><div style="padding:24px 36px 0;"><span class="product-tag">Fórmula 03</span> <div class="product-name">Glow</div> <span class="product-formula">Luminosidad Natural</span> <p class="product-desc">Aporta brillo y luminosidad natural, es antioxidante e hidratante profundo. Recupera el resplandor natural de tu piel.</p><div class="product-price" style="margin-top:16px;padding:0 36px;">$9 <span>USD</span></div></div> </div> <!-- F4 --> <div class="product-card"> <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Firm" style="width:100%;height:180px;object-fit:cover;display:block;margin-bottom:0;"><div style="padding:24px 36px 0;"><span class="product-tag">Fórmula 04</span> <div class="product-name">Firm</div> <span class="product-formula">Renovación & Embellecimiento</span> <p class="product-desc">Exfolia, renueva, nutre y embellece. Estimula la renovación celular para una piel tersa, luminosa y revitalizada.</p><div class="product-price" style="margin-top:16px;padding:0 36px;">$9 <span>USD</span></div></div> </div> </div>
</section> <!-- RESULTADOS -->
<section id="resultados"> <div class="center" style="position:relative;z-index:2;"> <span class="section-label"> Resultados Reales</span> <h2 class="section-title" style="color:var(--vanilla)">Números que<br>hablan por sí solos</h2> </div> <div class="stats-grid"> <div class="stat-item"> <div class="stat-number">+95%</div> <div class="stat-title">Ingredientes Naturales</div> <p class="stat-desc">Para un cuidado más puro, suave y premium en tu piel.</p> </div> <div class="stat-item"> <div class="stat-number">+8h</div> <div class="stat-title">Aroma y Frescura </div> <p class="stat-desc">Una sensación de bienestar y lujo que permanece contigo.</p> </div> <div class="stat-item"> <div class="stat-number">100%</div> <div class="stat-title">Artesanal Exclusiva </div> <p class="stat-desc">Cada jabón es creado con detalle, personalidad y calidad superior.</p> </div> <div class="stat-item"> <div class="stat-number">+90%</div> <div class="stat-title">Hidratación y Suavidad </div> <p class="stat-desc">Resultados que transforman tu rutina diaria en autocuidado premium.</p> </div> </div>
</section> <!-- PROCESO -->
<section id="proceso"> <div class="center"> <span class="section-label"> Nuestro Proceso</span> <h2 class="section-title">Del ingrediente<br>a tu piel</h2> <div class="divider"></div> </div> <div class="process-track"> <div class="process-line"></div> <div class="process-steps"> <div class="process-step"> <div class="step-dot" style="overflow:hidden;padding:0;border:2px solid var(--gold);"><img src="data:image/png;base64," style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;border-radius:50%;display:block;"></div> <span class="step-num">Paso 01</span> <div class="step-title">Selección de Ingredientes y Aditivos</div> <p class="step-desc">Solo ingredientes premium de origen natural, elegidos por su pureza y eficacia.</p> </div> <div class="process-step"> <div class="step-dot" style="overflow:hidden;padding:0;border:2px solid var(--gold);"><img src="data:image/png;base64," style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;border-radius:50%;display:block;"></div> <span class="step-num">Paso 02</span> <div class="step-title">Diseño Artesanal</div> <p class="step-desc">Cada fórmula es diseñada con precisión para responder a las necesidades únicas de tu piel.</p> </div> <div class="process-step"> <div class="step-dot" style="overflow:hidden;padding:0;border:2px solid var(--gold);"><img src="data:image/png;base64," style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;border-radius:50%;display:block;"></div> <span class="step-num">Paso 03</span> <div class="step-title">Elaboración y Curado</div> <p class="step-desc">Proceso artesanal con curado natural que garantiza la calidad y efectividad del producto.</p> </div> <div class="process-step"> <div class="step-dot" style="overflow:hidden;padding:0;border:2px solid var(--gold);"><img src="data:image/png;base64," style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;border-radius:50%;display:block;"></div> <span class="step-num">Paso 04</span> <div class="step-title">Resultados en tu Piel</div> <p class="step-desc">El resultado: una piel transformada, luminosa y un momento de bienestar que disfrutarás cada día.</p> </div> </div> </div>
</section> <!-- SOBRE MÍ -->
<section id="sobre"> <div class="about-inner"> <div class="about-portrait"> <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Enyolis Villalobos" style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;object-position:center top;border-radius:4px;"> </div> <div class="about-text"> <span class="section-label"> La Fundadora</span> <h2 class="about-name">Enyolis Chiquinquirá<br>Villalobos Rodríguez</h2> <span class="about-role">Creadora &amp; CEO · Essenza Natura · Maracaibo, Venezuela</span> <p class="about-bio">Soy Enyo Villalobos, una emprendedora apasionada por el bienestar, la belleza natural y los detalles que hacen especial cada momento. Creé esta marca con el propósito de transformar el cuidado personal en una experiencia de lujo, combinando ingredientes naturales, elegancia y autenticidad en cada producto.<br><br>Mi especialidad es el <strong>desarrollo de fórmulas para el cuidado de tu piel inspirados en naturaleza, exclusividad y bienestar</strong>, convirtiendo cada producto en una vivencia sensorial que va más allá del cuidado de la piel.</p> <div class="about-values"> <div class="about-value"> <span></span> <p><strong>Naturaleza pura:</strong> Ingredientes seleccionados por sus propiedades reales y su origen natural. Fórmulas que sí funcionan.</p> </div> <div class="about-value"> <span></span> <p><strong>Exclusividad artesanal:</strong> Cada jabón lleva la huella de un proceso cuidadoso y personalizado.</p> </div> <div class="about-value"> <span></span> <p><strong>Bienestar integral:</strong> Transformar el baño en un lujo natural de autocuidado y reconexión personal.</p> </div> </div> </div> </div>
</section> <!-- TESTIMONIOS -->
<section id="testimonios"> <div class="center"> <span class="section-label"> Lo que dicen ellas</span> <h2 class="section-title">Resultados que<br>hablan por sí solos</h2> <div class="divider"></div> </div> <div class="testimonios-grid"> <div class="testimonio"> <span class="quote-mark">&ldquo;</span> <p class="testimonio-text">Desde que uso la fórmula Glow, mi piel tiene una luminosidad que nunca antes había tenido. El aroma me acompaña todo el día y cada baño se convierte en un momento especial que espero con ansias. Nunca volvería a un jabón genérico.</p> <div class="stars"></div> <div class="testimonio-author"> <div class="author-avatar"></div> <div> <div class="author-name">Valentina Rincón</div> <div class="author-loc">Bogotá, Colombia</div> </div> </div> </div> <div class="testimonio"> <span class="quote-mark">&ldquo;</span> <p class="testimonio-text">El Kit Premium fue el mejor regalo que me hice. La calidad de los ingredientes se siente desde el primer uso, y el jabón Calm transformó mi rutina nocturna completamente. Es exactamente el lujo natural que buscaba para mimarse sin culpa.</p> <div class="stars"></div> <div class="testimonio-author"> <div class="author-avatar"></div> <div> <div class="author-name">Isabella Moreno</div> <div class="author-loc">Caracas, Venezuela</div> </div> </div> </div> </div>
</section> <!-- CTA FINAL -->
<section id="cta"> <div class="cta-inner"> <span class="section-label"> Empieza Hoy</span> <h2 class="cta-title">"El verdadero lujo comienza en la forma en que decides cuidarte"</h2> <p class="cta-desc">Permite que cada baño se convierta en un momento de relajación, frescura y bienestar diseñado especialmente para ti.</p> <a href="https://wa.me/584122558967?text=Hola%20Enyo%2C%20me%20gustar%C3%ADa%20conocer%20los%20productos%20que%20m%C3%A1s%20se%20adapten%20a%20mis%20necesidades%20%F0%9F%8C%BF" target="_blank" class="btn-cta">Pregunta por los Productos que más se Adapten a ti</a> </div>
</section> <!-- FOOTER -->
<footer> <div class="footer-inner"> <div class="footer-brand"> <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Essenza Natura" style="border-radius:50%;object-fit:cover;width:60px;height:60px;display:block;"> <p class="footer-tagline">Lujo natural para el<br>cuidado personal más auténtico.</p> </div> <div class="footer-col"> <div class="footer-col-title">Colección</div> <ul> <li><a href="#productos">Kit Premium</a></li> <li><a href="#productos">Fórmula Detox</a></li> <li><a href="#productos">Fórmula Calm</a></li> <li><a href="#productos">Fórmula Glow</a></li> <li><a href="#productos">Fórmula Firm</a></li> </ul> </div> <div class="footer-col"> <div class="footer-col-title">Contáctame</div> <div class="social-links"> <a href="https://www.instagram.com/essenzanatura2026?igsh=MXM4YzNoajV5d3Rleg%3D%3D&utm_source=qr" target="_blank" class="social-link"> <span class="social-icon" </footer> <!-- WHATSAPP FLOAT -->
<a href="https://wa.me/584122558967?text=Hola%20Enyo%2C%20me%20gustar%C3%ADa%20saber%20m%C3%A1s%20sobre%20los%20jabones%20artesanales%20%F0%9F%8C%BF" target="_blank" class="wa-float" title="Escríbeme por WhatsApp"> <div class="wa-pulse"></div> <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 32 32" width="30" height="30" fill="#fff"> <path d="M16 0C7.163 0 0 7.163 0 16c0 2.83.74 5.49 2.03 7.8L0 32l8.43-2.01A15.93 15.93 0 0016 32c8.837 0 16-7.163 16-16S24.837 0 16 0zm0 29.2a13.17 13.17 0 01-6.72-1.84l-.48-.29-4.99 1.19 1.22-4.86-.31-.5A13.14 13.14 0 012.8 16C2.8 8.71 8.71 2.8 16 2.8S29.2 8.71 29.2 16 23.29 29.2 16 29.2zm7.22-9.87c-.4-.2-2.34-1.15-2.7-1.28-.36-.13-.63-.2-.89.2-.26.4-1.01 1.28-1.24 1.54-.23.26-.46.29-.85.1-.4-.2-1.67-.62-3.18-1.96-1.18-1.05-1.97-2.34-2.2-2.74-.23-.4-.02-.61.17-.81.18-.18.4-.46.6-.69.2-.23.26-.4.4-.66.13-.26.06-.49-.03-.69-.1-.2-.89-2.15-1.22-2.94-.32-.77-.65-.67-.89-.68l-.76-.01c-.26 0-.69.1-1.05.49-.36.4-1.38 1.35-1.38 3.28s1.41 3.8 1.61 4.07c.2.26 2.78 4.25 6.74 5.96.94.41 1.68.65 2.25.83.95.3 1.81.26 2.49.16.76-.11 2.34-.96 2.67-1.88.33-.93.33-1.72.23-1.88-.1-.17-.36-.27-.76-.46z"/> </svg>
</a> <script>
// Scroll animations
const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => { entries.forEach(e => { if (e.isIntersecting) { e.target.style.opacity = '1'; e.target.style.transform = 'translateY(0)'; } });
}, { threshold: 0.12 }); document.querySelectorAll('.product-card, .stat-item, .problem-card, .process-step, .testimonio, .about-value').forEach(el => { el.style.opacity = '0'; el.style.transform = 'translateY(28px)'; el.style.transition = 'opacity .6s ease, transform .6s ease'; observer.observe(el);
}); // Stagger product cards
document.querySelectorAll('.product-card').forEach((el, i) => { el.style.transitionDelay = `${i * 0.08}s`;
});
document.querySelectorAll('.stat-item').forEach((el, i) => { el.style.transitionDelay = `${i * 0.1}s`;
});
document.querySelectorAll('.problem-card').forEach((el, i) => { el.style.transitionDelay = `${i * 0.1}s`;
});
</script> </body>
</html>
